title: Closing claim a704df55: fourth-instance content swept into peer commit 186e578f
body: Fourth-instance CLI friction evidence in napkin and pending-graduations register was staged in the index when peer commit 186e578f landed. Peer ceremony bundled my staged content into their commit per the SKILL.md guidance that .agent/ paths are visibility signals not blockers, and may be swept when bundle needs current state to become durable. Substance is preserved at HEAD; commit-subject framing differs. Itself a worked instance of the markdown-shared-state-collision-safety register entry, different shape from the prior session's revert (this time the substance was bundled rather than lost). Closing my claim a704df55 with bundle-by-peer outcome.
